expressions.english: text message
to get a text message
to ignore one's text message
expressions.notes: 씹다 is a slang expression that means "to ignore one's text message or what one says."

expressions.english: to send a text message; to text
to send text messages to each other
Send me a text message.
Tell me with a text message.
I'll text you later.
Why do you keep ignoring my text messages?
Don't send me phony text messages.
expressions.notes:
장난 = prank
장난 문자 = phony text message

expressions.english: I will send you my contact information via text message.
Did you see the text message I sent you yesterday?
expressions.notes: 보시다 = (honorific) to see; to look; to watch

expressions.english: Can you send text messages from overseas?
I got the text message, but I haven't read it yet.

expressions.korean: 전화 통화가 안 돼서 문자 보냈어요.
expressions.english: I couldn't get through when I called you, so I sent a text message.
expressions.notes:
통화 = phone call, telephone conversation
안 되다 = S + doesn't work; can't + V

expressions.korean: 핸드폰 액정이 깨져서 문자를 못 읽어요.
expressions.english: The display screen on my cellphone is cracked, so I can't read text messages.
expressions.notes:
핸드폰 = mobile phone
액정 = display screen (usually for mobile phones)
깨지다 = to be cracked, broken

expressions.korean: 지금은 전화 못 하니까 문자로 보낼게요.
expressions.english: I can't call you right now, so I will send a text message.

expressions.korean: 그 사람은 문자 메시지를 참 재미있게 보내요.
expressions.english: His text messages are funny.
expressions.notes:
참 = very, quite
재미있다 = to be fun; to be funny; to be interesting
재미있게 is the adverb form of 재미있다.

expressions.korean: 핸드폰 문자 메시지를 너무 많이 써서 손이 아파요.
expressions.english: I've been texting too much, so my hands are sore.
expressions.notes:
문자를 쓰다 = to send text messages; to use text messaging service
손 = hand
아프다 = to be sick, hurt

expressions.korean: 저는 문자 쓰는 거 별로 안 좋아해요. 전화하는 게 편해요.
expressions.english: I don't really like texting. It's more convenient to call.
expressions.notes:
별로 = not particularly, not very, not so much, not really
좋아하다 = to like
편하다 = to be comfortable; to be convenient
